title: paspalum alterniflorum
intro: Paspalum alterniflorum, also known as Paspalidium geminatum or False Bluegrass, is a type of grass-like plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paspalum alterniflorum include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Paspalum alterniflorum include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
